tools.purpose: Static Solidity analysis for access control, reentrancy, unchecked transfers, shadowing, and known EVM footguns.
Independent Solidity static analyzer to cross-check Slither-style findings with a separate ruleset.
Open Source Vulnerabilities dependency audit for lockfiles and reachable package metadata.
Pattern-based source scan for JavaScript/TypeScript script hazards, secrets, and unsafe shell/process usage.
